done_summary:
Produced a structured Project Aurora status report for CEO Brendan from 6 weekly meeting notes. Deliverables:

- **`/workspace/status_report.md`** (488 words) — Structured report with:
  - Headline: V1 targets end-of-July GA; SDK ships in private beta pending legal contracts
  - 6 workstreams with owners, status, and V1-blocking flags
  - 5 risks ordered by severity (2 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 1 LOW)
  - 6 decisions made chronologically with dates and deciders
  - 4 milestones with target dates and owners
  - 3 open questions/asks for CEO attention (legal escalation, Maevia expectations, V1 date contingency)

- **`/workspace/research/notes.md`** — Working synthesis notes showing workstream identification, decision extraction, risk assessment, and milestone mapping

- **`/workspace/README.md`** — Guide to reading the output

All claims trace to the source notes with week citations. No owners, dates, or details were invented. Final commit tagged as release.
